diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thanks for calling Genshin Impact Player Support, this is Diego. How can I help?
[Caller] I just cleared Spiral Abyss floor 12 chamber 3 with 9 stars and when I went back to check, my progress showed 6 stars on chamber 2 and chamber 3 was locked again. I lost my run.
[Agent] That is brutal — Spiral Abyss runs take real effort and losing a 9-star clear to a progress-save bug is a huge deal. Let me pull your account immediately. UID?
[Caller] 832118007.
[Agent] Thanks, Yuki. Checking your Abyss telemetry now. Confirmed — I can see the successful clear events: chamber 1 three stars at 21:14, chamber 2 three stars at 21:19, chamber 3 three stars at 21:26. All nine stars logged server-side. Then at 21:27 a state-sync error occurred between the Abyss instance and your profile service, and your client rolled back chambers 2 and 3 to partial progress.
[Caller] So it's confirmed in your logs — I actually cleared it?
[Agent] One hundred percent confirmed. Your clear is in our system, just not reflected in your client state. Here's what I'm doing. First, escalating to engineering with your telemetry attached — P1 because this affects Abyss rewards which are time-locked to the cycle. Second, because a full state fix requires an engineering deploy and can take 24 to 48 hours, I'm issuing interim compensation right now so you're not waiting empty-handed: the exact Primogem rewards for chambers 2 and 3 at 3 stars each — that's 600 Primogems total — delivered via in-game mail.
[Caller] OK, but what about the chamber state? I want to be able to attempt the next cycle cleanly.
[Agent] Engineering will restore your state to 9/9 stars for this cycle before the next reset so your completion history is accurate and you don't lose out on abyssal moon blessing rewards. You'll get a follow-up email confirming the fix when it's deployed.
[Caller] Perfect. That's exactly what I wanted.
[Agent] Ticket number going in your email so you can track it. If anything feels off after the fix, just reference that number and we'll re-verify.
[Caller] Thanks Diego, really professional handling.
[Agent] My pleasure, Yuki. Sorry again for the hassle — enjoy the rest of your week!
